prompt.input: Before RA-Stata starts the event-study, write the identification note for a treaty-port exposure design.

fixture_outputs.codex: AiEconLab Theorist response: hold RA work until the identification note fixes the target parameter, comparison group, estimand, estimator, exclusion restriction, and falsification tests. I would name the assumptions explicitly, route the design decision to PI, and ask RA-Stata to run only after the note is signed off.
fixture_outputs.claude-code: AEL theorist: before RA-Stata starts, write the identification note around the estimand, comparison group, target parameter, exclusion restriction, and falsification tests. PI should sign off before RA work begins.
fixture_outputs.opencode: AiEconLab identification note: the Theorist blocks execution until the comparison group, estimand, estimator, and identifying assumptions are explicit. Route to PI, then RA-Stata runs after signoff.
